accessFees.description: This value indicates under what conditions access fees are charged. Options are UNKNOWN, DOMESTIC, INTERNATIONAL, DOMESTIC_AND_INTERNATIONAL, NO_FEE.

addressLine1.description: Line 1 of the street address for the ATM location. Usually includes the street number and name.

addressLine2.description: Line 2 of the street address usually an apartment number or suite number.

availability.description: This value indicates the availability hours of the ATM. Options are UNKNOWN, ALWAYS_AVAILABLE, BUSINESS_HOURS, IRREGULAR_HOURS.

camera.description: This value indicates whether or not a security camera is present or near ATM

countryCode.description: Three digit alpha country code as defined in ISO

countrySubdivisionCode.description: Code of the state or province for an ATM location.

countrySubdivisionName.description: Name of the state or province for an ATM location.

city.description: The name of the city for an ATM location.

distance.description: This is the numerical value for the distance from the provided location to the selected ATM.

distanceUnit.description: This is the unit of measure value for the distance from the provided location to the selected ATM. Options are KM and MILE.

handicapAccessible.description: This indicates whether the ATM has the ability to read chip cards or not. Options are UNKNOWN, IS_HANDICAP_ACCESSIBLE, NOT_HANDICAP_ACCESSIBLE.

hasSharedDeposit.description: This value indicates whether or not the ATM participates in the Mastercard Shared Deposit network. Options are YES or NO.

isSurchargeFreeAlliance.description: This value indicates whether or not the ATM participates in the Mastercard Shared (only) Surcharge Free Alliance network. Options are YES or NO.

locationName.description: The name of the ATM location

locationType.description: Type of location for the ATM. Options are OTHER, AIRPORT, HOSPITAL, FINANCIAL_INSTITUTION.

owner.description: This is the DBA name of the financial institution affiliate or independent service organization.

ownerICA.description: This is the ICA of the entity that owns the ATM

postalCode.description: The postal code of the ATM location.

sponsor.description: This is the legal or business name of the entity that sponsors the owner of the ATM into the Mastercard network.

sponsorICA.description: This is the ICA of entity that sponsors the owner of the ATM

supportsEmv.description: This indicates whether the ATM has the ability to read chip cards or not. Options are UNKNOWN, SUPPORTS_EMV, DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_EMV.

surchargeFreeAllianceNetwork.description: This value indicates whether or not the ATM participates in the Mastercard Shared (only) Surcharge Free Alliance network. Options are DOES_NOT_PARTICIPATE_IN_SFA, ALLPOINT_PREPAID, MONEYPASS_DEBIT, and ALL_SURCHARGE_FREE.
